mapper.sql: id, DeptNo, OldDeptNo, DeptName, Address, TeleNo, FaxNo, SuperIntendent, InsidePsn, EmailAddr, EmailAC, StockCode, StateCode, PostCode, ProvinceCode, ProvinceName, DeptENName, GPSLng, GPSLat, ParentDeptNo, warehouse_code, sub_warehouse_code, ReportEmail, trade_companyId, CityCode, DlvDay, IsValid, emailOrder, EmailStock, EmailCSStock, EmailSubStock, EmailUserStock, EmailDirector
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.department
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.department (id, DeptNo, OldDeptNo, DeptName, Address, TeleNo, FaxNo, SuperIntendent, InsidePsn, EmailAddr, EmailAC, StockCode, StateCode, PostCode, ProvinceCode, ProvinceName, DeptENName, GPSLng, GPSLat, ParentDeptNo, warehouse_code, sub_warehouse_code, ReportEmail, trade_companyId, CityCode, DlvDay, IsValid, emailOrder, EmailStock, EmailCSStock, EmailSubStock, EmailUserStock, EmailDirector ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{olddeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailac,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provincename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{gpslng,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{gpslat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{parentdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportemail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isvalid,jdbcType=BIT}, #{emailorder,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{emailstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{emailcsstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{emailsubstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{emailuserstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{emaildirector,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.department
id,
DeptNo,
OldDeptNo,
DeptName,
Address,
TeleNo,
FaxNo,
SuperIntendent,
InsidePsn,
EmailAddr,
EmailAC,
StockCode,
StateCode,
PostCode,
ProvinceCode,
ProvinceName,
DeptENName,
GPSLng,
GPSLat,
ParentDeptNo,
warehouse_code,
sub_warehouse_code,
ReportEmail,
trade_companyId,
CityCode,
DlvDay,
IsValid,
emailOrder,
EmailStock,
EmailCSStock,
EmailSubStock,
EmailUserStock,
EmailDirector,

mapper.update:
update dbo.department
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OldDeptNo = #{record.olddeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptName = #{record.deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TeleNo = #{record.teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNo = #{record.faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SuperIntendent = #{record.superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InsidePsn = #{record.insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmailAddr = #{record.emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmailAC = #{record.emailac,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProvinceCode = #{record.provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProvinceName = #{record.provincename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptENName = #{record.deptenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
GPSLng = #{record.gpslng,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
GPSLat = #{record.gpslat,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ParentDeptNo = #{record.parentdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_warehouse_code = #{record.subWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ReportEmail = #{record.reportemail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CityCode = #{record.citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvDay = #{record.dlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
IsValid = #{record.isvalid,jdbcType=BIT},
emailOrder = #{record.emailorder,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailStock = #{record.emailstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailCSStock = #{record.emailcsstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailSubStock = #{record.emailsubstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailUserStock = #{record.emailuserstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailDirector = #{record.emaildirector,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.department set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OldDeptNo = #{record.olddeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DeptName = #{record.deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Address = #{record.address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TeleNo = #{record.teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FaxNo = #{record.faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SuperIntendent = #{record.superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InsidePsn = #{record.insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmailAddr = #{record.emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmailAC = #{record.emailac,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, StateCode = #{record.statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PostCode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProvinceCode = #{record.provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProvinceName = #{record.provincename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DeptENName = #{record.deptenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, GPSLng = #{record.gpslng,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, GPSLat = #{record.gpslat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ParentDeptNo = #{record.parentdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_warehouse_code = #{record.subWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ReportEmail = #{record.reportemail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{record.tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CityCode = #{record.citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DlvDay = #{record.dlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, IsValid = #{record.isvalid,jdbcType=BIT}, emailOrder = #{record.emailorder,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailStock = #{record.emailstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailCSStock = #{record.emailcsstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailSubStock = #{record.emailsubstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailUserStock = #{record.emailuserstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailDirector = #{record.emaildirector,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.department
DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OldDeptNo = #{olddeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptName = #{deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Address = #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
TeleNo = #{teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FaxNo = #{faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SuperIntendent = #{superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InsidePsn = #{insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmailAddr = #{emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmailAC = #{emailac,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
StateCode = #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PostCode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProvinceCode = #{provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProvinceName = #{provincename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptENName = #{deptenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
GPSLng = #{gpslng,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
GPSLat = #{gpslat,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
ParentDeptNo = #{parentdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sub_warehouse_code = #{subWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ReportEmail = #{reportemail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CityCode = #{citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvDay = #{dlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER},
IsValid = #{isvalid,jdbcType=BIT},
emailOrder = #{emailorder,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailStock = #{emailstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailCSStock = #{emailcsstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailSubStock = #{emailsubstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailUserStock = #{emailuserstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
EmailDirector = #{emaildirector,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.department set DeptNo = #{deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OldDeptNo = #{olddeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DeptName = #{deptname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, Address = #{address,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, TeleNo = #{teleno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FaxNo = #{faxno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SuperIntendent = #{superintendent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, InsidePsn = #{insidepsn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmailAddr = #{emailaddr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EmailAC = #{emailac,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, StockCode = #{stockcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, StateCode = #{statecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PostCode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProvinceCode = #{provincecode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ProvinceName = #{provincename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DeptENName = #{deptenname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, GPSLng = #{gpslng,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, GPSLat = #{gpslat,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, ParentDeptNo = #{parentdeptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sub_warehouse_code = #{subWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ReportEmail = #{reportemail,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, trade_companyId = #{tradeCompanyid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CityCode = #{citycode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DlvDay = #{dlvday,jdbcType=INTEGER}, IsValid = #{isvalid,jdbcType=BIT}, emailOrder = #{emailorder,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailStock = #{emailstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailCSStock = #{emailcsstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailSubStock = #{emailsubstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailUserStock = #{emailuserstock,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, EmailDirector = #{emaildirector,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
